paper_title: Evalita-LLM: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Italian
evaluation_method: Italian abstractive summarization task from the Evalita-LLM benchmark. The model must generate concise summaries of Italian news articles from the Fanpage (FP) dataset, which includes 84,308 Italian news articles spanning 9 categories with titles, brief summaries, and detailed descriptions. Evaluation uses ROUGE scores (ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, ROUGE-L, ROUGE-LS) measuring overlap between generated summaries and reference summaries. This is a generative task evaluated with a specific prompt template.
